sections.title: Credit Risk Assessment
sections.description: The data you gathered digitally is used to generate additional insights.
benefits: Faster credit disbursement through automated decision support
Less credit default based on a better view on risks

sections.title: Social, Climate and Nature-Related Financial Risks
sections.description: We provide a clear view on all risks that can affect your investment through digitally integrated climate risk maps. In partnership with the International Center for Tropical Agriculture (CIAT), we provide comprehensive climate risk data.
benefits: Clear view on climate- and nature-related risk in credit assessments
Risk assessment available for any sector, from agriculture to construction

sections.title: Resilience Finance
sections.description: Verify your investments according to established taxonomies. Taxonomies define eligible investments for resilience finance. Automatic verification is included in the credit process, ensuring productivity and resiliency benefits are achieved.
benefits: Identify green or social loans, ensure real impact
Prove impact to investors without extra effort

highlight.title: Green Microcredit Verification
highlight.text: Our methodology developed with UNEP assures correct fund use, with structured follow-up visits documented digitally to exclude greenwashing.

sections.title: Performance Monitoring
sections.description: Monitor where your team spends most time, its productivity and on which clients they focus.
metrics: Number of loans assessed in period
Time to fill in forms and most modified fields for crosschecks

sections.title: Capacity Building
sections.description: We offer institutional assessment, consultancy, and training services to strengthen your organization.

services.title: Institutional Assessment
services.description: Evaluation of capacities regarding digital finance, sustainable finance, ESG impact finance, and strategic management based on proven methodology.

services.title: Consultancy
services.description: Technical expertise supporting tool adjustments, policy refinement, and strategic improvement with tangible outcomes focus.

services.title: Training
services.description: Department-specific support for swift tool adoption with interactive, reviewable materials and training-of-trainers options.
